name: Wall Plug Connector
description: PCB-mount AC wall plug connector. Body is 26.3×3.6×5.4mm. Two 4.5mm-diameter prongs (32mm long, 20mm center-to-center) extend from the front face for plugging into a wall outlet. On the back, leads extend 7mm horizontally from the connecting bar, then bend downward into pins that descend 5.5mm for through-hole mounting. Mounts through the enclosure side wall so the prongs protrude outside the device. Cutout matches the full body cross-section.

pins.label: Live
pins.description: Live AC terminal. Lead extends from connecting bar then bends down into a through-hole pin.

pins.label: Neutral
pins.description: Neutral AC terminal. Lead extends from connecting bar then bends down into a through-hole pin.

features.label: Prong (Live)
features.description: Live prong extending forward from the body front face. 4.5mm diameter, 32mm long, horizontal.

features.label: Prong (Neutral)
features.description: Neutral prong extending forward from the body front face. 4.5mm diameter, 32mm long, horizontal.

features.label: Prong connecting bar
features.description: Horizontal crossbar of H-shaped cutout. Connects the two prong lead paths at the back of the body.

features.label: Lead channel (Live)
features.description: Left leg of H-shaped cutout. Clearance for the Live lead from connecting bar to pin drop point.

features.label: Lead channel (Neutral)
features.description: Right leg of H-shaped cutout. Clearance for the Neutral lead from connecting bar to pin drop point.
